news.title:
Adani Total Gas board to meet on April 27, 2026, to review Q4FY26 results and possibly decide on dividends.
Company's shares fell 4% in five days and declined 12% YTD; last dividend was Rs 0.25 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Total Gas surged 12.4% intraday, rebounding after a 4-day, 15% slump, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.2% decline.
Geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices influenced energy stocks; Brent crude rose 3.4% to $111.07 per barrel.

news.title:
